{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Orthos' core
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos' core]] was unsteady.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
